title: スマートファルコン登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon and I begin our challenge of
competing in the Twinkle Series at last.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her dream is to become a top Umadol—a new
kind of idol who competes in races and shines
brightly in concerts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The dirt races she's best suited for don't draw the
same crowds as the ones on turf, but she's still
determined to shine there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She puts on street performances daily, but a
single little girl is her entire audience. However,
her dream to become the top Umadol on dirt is
only just beginning!
